product/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
product/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with JDK 21 results in compilation errors or runtime failures due to deprecated APIs and module system incompatibilities.

product/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
product/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.
